description: Coach Book v4 — tactical knowledge corpus for the COPER coaching engine. Per-map and cross-map files covering 13 categories: positioning, utility, economy, aim_and_duels, mid_round, retakes_post_plant, anti_strat, role_play (entry/awp/support/lurk/igl), and clutch_play. Aligned to CS2 Premier Season 4 active duty pool (2026-01).
notes: Each file uses the same schema as the legacy tactical_knowledge.json: {"knowledge": [{...}]}.
Allowed entry fields: title, description, category, situation, map_name, pro_example.
Unknown fields are stripped by the loader for forward-compat.
Embedding version is tracked separately in KnowledgeEmbedder.CURRENT_VERSION.
